prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (Red Top, 205hp stock) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 260° cams, and a N1-spec oil pump for high-RPM reliability. Pair with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power, featuring a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a 76mm muffler for optimal spool and backpressure management.

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco 4-point strut tower bar (U12-specific) and a full seam-welded subframe using 1.6mm DOM steel tubing. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for U12 weight distribution) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance.

Fuel system upgrade with a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors (1000cc/min), and a custom-mapped Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with individual cylinder trims for the SR20DET. Cooling system includes a Koyorad 36-row aluminum radiator and a Setrab 19-row oil cooler with AN-10 fittings to prevent heat soak during track use.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (U12-specific) with carbon fiber front bumper, overfenders, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Side skirts modified to fit a custom 3M 1080 series vinyl wrap in 'Gunmetal Metallic' with a matte clear coat for UV protection.

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (U12-specific mounts) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (4-point, bolt-in, with harness bar). Shift knob replaced with a titanium-topped HKS Racing Pro (short throw) for the SR20DET gearbox.

Lighting upgrade to Hella 500 Series headlights with CREE LED projectors and a custom HID retrofit (35W, 6000K), paired with Philips VisionPlus bulbs for the taillights. Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 16x8 +35 (front) and 16x9 +35 (rear) with Toyo R888R tires (205/50/16 front, 225/50/16 rear) for staggered fitment.
